overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from a video game showing a nighttime exploration of a rainy Western harbor dock. The player walks along wooden piers past shipping crates, wooden wagons, and a paddle steamer riverboat, encountering an NPC worker before entering a narrow alleyway between buildings.

round wooden barrels grouped near the dock edge

tall wooden lamp post with warm glowing lantern
large metal-framed arched roof structure with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night at a wooden harbor dock. The camera moves past shipping crates and barrels toward a two-story wooden building with warm lights, while a large metal train station structure looms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock area with wooden wagons and cargo

NPC worker comes into view standing near wooden crates

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a worker standing near cargo crates

entered.detail: old-fashioned wooden wagon with large spoked wheels

segments.scene_description: Moving along the dock, the player passes an NPC worker standing near cargo. Wooden wagons come into view as the rain intensifies, while the large metal train station structure draws closer on the right.

events.description: moving past wooden wagons toward the waterfront paddle steamer

agents.ego_description: walking past stationary wooden wagons toward the riverboat docked at the pier

entered.detail: large white paddle steamer with twin smokestacks and lit cabin windows
wooden railing along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The player moves past wooden wagons toward a large paddle steamer docked at the waterfront. The metal train station structure shifts to the left as the riverboat becomes the dominant feature ahead.

events.description: turning right to follow the dock alongside the paddle steamer

agents.ego_description: turning to walk alongside the paddle steamer and view the water

entered.detail: wooden tables and benches along the dock railing
large wooden mercantile building with BLACKWATER signage

segments.scene_description: Turning along the waterfront, the player walks beside the paddle steamer with wooden tables lining the railing. The Blackwater mercantile building comes into view on the left as the train station structure falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between wooden warehouse buildings

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between wooden buildings with No Smoking signs

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow enclosed alley with corrugated metal walls

entered.detail: metal sign reading NO SMOKING mounted on corrugated wall
narrow passage between tall wooden warehouse buildings
wooden plank fence lining the alley

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow alleyway between wooden warehouse buildings, passing No Smoking signs on the corrugated metal walls. The paddle steamer and open dock disappear from view as the space becomes enclosed and sheltered from the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy harbor dock that gradually transitions from an open waterfront into a confined urban alleyway. It begins by moving past shipping crates and barrels toward a warm, lit wooden building while a massive metal train station structure looms in the distance. As the camera advances, the rain intensifies and the player passes a dock worker and wooden wagons, drawing closer to the train station before the view shifts toward a large paddle steamer docked at the waterfront. The scene then opens up along the riverboat's railing and wooden tables, bringing the Blackwater mercantile building into view as the train station recedes behind the camera. Finally, the movement turns away from the open dock and into a narrow alleyway between wooden warehouses, where corrugated metal walls and no smoking signs replace the open sky and shelter the player from the rain.
